title: tax — authorization policies
description: Four policies, one per owned model. Every ability resolves through spatie/laravel-permission, then narrows by tenant scope. Write actions on TaxCalculation are NEVER allowed via API — calculations are persisted only via the CalculateTaxForInvoiceLineJob path (calculation-freeze pattern). Real-time preview is a distinct ability that does NOT persist.

abilities.scope: any tenant member with tax_capture entitlement + finance/admin/owner/support role
finance + admin + owner. Requires tax_capture entitlement.
finance + admin + owner. Refused at observer layer when the rate has been referenced by any tax_calculation.
admin + owner. Soft-delete only.
finance + admin + owner. Trigger on-demand SyncTaxRatesFromProviderJob.
any tenant member with tax_capture. Sees both platform-reference (tenant_id IS NULL) + tenant-custom jurisdictions.
finance + admin + owner. Requires tax_jurisdiction_custom entitlement (Enterprise-only for tenant-scoped custom jurisdictions).
finance + admin + owner. Refused on platform-reference jurisdictions (tenant_id IS NULL) unless caller is super_admin.
admin + owner. Soft-delete only. Refused when any tax_rates references the jurisdiction (RESTRICT FK).
customers see own exemptions (customer_type='User' AND customer_id=me); admin/owner/finance/compliance see all tenant exemptions; support sees cross-tenant redacted view
same as viewAny + certificate_number redacted for support role
authenticated user for own customer record OR admin/owner/finance for any customer in tenant. Requires tax_exemption_management entitlement.
same as create. Note: verification_status transitions go through dedicated verify/reject abilities, not update.
admin + owner + compliance role. Transitions verification_status pending → verified.
admin + owner + compliance role. Transitions verification_status pending → rejected with reason.
exemptions retain 7 years post-expiry via retention pipeline
any tenant member with tax_capture + finance/admin/owner/support role
same as viewAny
calculations are persisted ONLY via the CalculateTaxForInvoiceLineJob path (invoice-line listener). No direct API create.
finance + admin + owner. Real-time preview via POST /api/v1/tax/calculate — does NOT persist a calculation row.
calculations are immutable after commit
calculations migrate to archive at 7 years; no manual delete
cross-tenant support tool for platform ops
